Inman Perk Coffee | One of Life's Little Perks
Coffee Shop Classics and Modern Favorites:
Served with quality ingredients – handled with care!
The Square – Gainesville, GA:
A vibrant hometown coffee scene!
Drip Coffee Our coffee is freshly roasted and ground to brew. We offer a variety of roasts so ask our baristas what we have brewing today!   Espresso Shot Ground to order and pulled by hand. Ask for a double, or triple shot. Cortado Two shots of espresso with Raw sugar brewed in with steamed Half & Half. Served in 8oz...
Fill your home or office with the wonderful aroma and taste of Inman Perk Coffees!!  Our beans are carefully selected from the most sought after Arabica beans.  Shipped to our roaster Stockton Graham & Co. as green beans and specially roasted to suit each bean’s flavor profile.  We provide a wide range...

Community Powered Coffee Shop - Gainesville
More About Our Company
Inman Perk Coffee was once just a family’s idea — an idea to bring really good coffee and a warm, comfortable atmosphere to the Inman Park neighborhood of Atlanta, Georgia. Today, the reality is that you can enjoy a variety of delicious specialty hot and cold beverages—along with decadent desserts, engaging artwork, and a free wireless Internet hotspot in the Gainesville location.
In early 2020 the family sold the Inman Park location.
Inman Park
is often called “Atlanta’s oldest neighborhood”—and today, it thrives as a community of people who are interested in making their neighborhood a better place. Inman Perk Coffee believes in that goal, and one of our missions is to use our stores to help the communities around us. We also work hard to protect and better the environment through our products and practices. We want you and your friends and family to be able to enjoy our coffee for generations to come.
As a family-owned and family-run business, we are constantly in contact with our customers and looking for ways to enhance your experience at our store. Our
Gainesville
location is open to serve you.
Whether you stop in regularly on your way to work in the mornings, or you bring your friends on special occasions for a fabulous evening of dessert and conversation, we hope you’ll be able to see the love and care we’ve put into Inman Perk to make it a truly unique and special coffee shop. Not only are our drinks made to exacting standards—which our
Golden Cup award
and commitment to
Sustainable Coffee
and
Fair Trade
products show—but our staff is genuinely concerned about making your moments at Inman Perk a pleasure.
We hope to see you soon!
We think you’ll agree that Inman Perk Coffee is one of life’s little perks!
